name: groundcraft
description: Evidence-driven research, planning, engineering, review, and operations for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Groundcraft takes substantial work from intent through research, planning, production, proof, and delivery while scaling process to task type, size, and risk.
defaultPrompt: Take this task from intent to verified delivery.
Diagnose this bug and prove the root-cause fix.
Research the trade-offs and recommend one design.
